nl_query: For each board in EVAL_IN_PROGRESS status, show the course code, total scripts, number of scripts in each evaluation status, the board coordinator name and honorarium weight, and the number of calendar days remaining until the deadline.
failed_sql: SELECT au.code AS academic_unit_code, COUNT(a.id) AS total_scripts, SUM(CASE WHEN ea.status = 'NOT_ASSIGNED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scripts_not_assigned, SUM(CASE WHEN ea.status = 'ASSIGNED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scripts_assigned, SUM(CASE WHEN ea.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scripts_in_progress, SUM(CASE WHEN ea.status = 'FROZEN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scripts_frozen, SUM(CASE WHEN ea.status = 'SUBMITTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scripts_submitted, COALESCE(b.deadline - CURRENT_DATE::DATE, 0) AS days_remaining, bc.name AS board_coordinator_name, bc.honorarium_weight FROM academic_unit au JOIN board b ON au.id = b.course_id JOIN answer_script a ON b.course_id = a.course_id AND b.exam_id = a.exam_id LEFT JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON a.id = ea.script_id LEFT JOIN faculty_cache fc ON ea.faculty_cache_id = fc.id LEFT JOIN board_coordinator bc ON fc.id = bc.faculty_cache_id WHERE b.status = 'EVAL_IN_PROGRESS' GROUP BY au.code, b.deadline, bc.name, bc.honorarium_weight ORDER BY au.code
error: Validation failed (aggregation): GROUP BY uses a descriptive column (like name, title, or code) without including the primary key (id). Names and titles may not be unique. Always include the entity's 'id' column in the GROUP BY clause alongside the descriptive column.
